note: Blog index for the NYC Digital Modernization project. Add posts here (newest first); blog.html renders them and links each to the docs viewer. imageTheme = skyline | street (alternate); bump imageVariant to re-roll the generated line-art banner.

posts.title: API, MCP, and Skill: The Experience of Operating New York City
posts.author: Kin Lane
posts.summary: Open data made the city readable. APIs, MCP tools, and Agent Skills — and the experience that ties them together — are what make it operable.

posts.title: The Low Hanging Fruit of Digital Modernization in New York City
posts.author: Kin Lane
posts.summary: Applying the same outside-in “low hanging fruit” method I used at the VA and Bloomberg to New York City — building on open data, but leading the next wave with APIs, MCP, and Agent Skills.
